evidence_quotes.quote: gambling mechanics are taking all joy from it
in-game property is required to complete in the game

paragraphs.text: I do love playing games as well as spend some time on the internet, but gambling mechanics are taking all joy from it as if I want in-game property really bad, but otherwise than through gamble mechanics I can not get it, that means that company is not interested in me playing or spending some time in their product, but they are interested in not-giving me what I want and triggering fear of lost opportunities. I kind of get it, but when this in-game property is required to complete in the game it makes that mechanic not fun and really unfair as I need to spend hundreds of EUR to play the game I have already bought alsomfor not cheap price.
